rationale: This skill is a prose reference of React/Next.js performance rules organized into prioritized categories with per-rule markdown files. A representative refactoring task will read the skill's own rule files (rules/*.md, AGENTS.md) and the user's React/Next.js source files, then write edits to those source files. There are no declared APIs, network endpoints, or build/test commands in the skill itself, so hosts and subprocesses are empty; deletions are unlikely since refactors edit in place.
